response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development with a strong focus on web and mobile technologies, but lacks the mandatory C++ and Windows platform experience required for this role. His background in Node.js, TypeScript, and other modern languages does not align with the core technical requirements of C++ development in capital markets or fixed-income systems.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals with diverse language experience
Experience with high-performance systems (low-latency apps, micro-services)
Proven ability to lead and mentor teams in agile practices
concerns: No demonstrated C++ development experience, especially on Windows platform
No domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking
Lacks SQL Server/Oracle experience, which is mandatory for the role
